_meta.description: Capabilities map for all AI agents — used by task-orchestrator for intelligent routing

sales.rationale: GPT-4o excels at persuasive, human-like copy

analytics.rationale: Claude excels at long-context data analysis

research.rationale: Claude excels at long-context research synthesis

general.rationale: Local Ollama for privacy-preserving general tasks

orchestrator.description: Master Orchestrator — routes tasks to specialist agents and coordinates multi-agent workflows

lead-hunter.description: B2B Lead Generation Specialist — finds decision makers, emails, and qualifies leads

content-master.description: SEO Content Specialist — writes 2000+ word optimized articles with proper structure

social-guru.description: Social Media Manager — finds viral content, writes engaging captions, generates hashtags

intel-agent.description: Competitive Intelligence Analyst — monitors competitors: pricing, features, reviews, traffic

product-scout.description: E-commerce Product Researcher — finds arbitrage opportunities, trending products, validates suppliers

email-ninja.description: Cold Email Specialist — builds sequences, personalizes at scale, optimizes deliverability

support-bot.description: E-commerce Support Bot — 24/7 customer service agent that classifies tickets, auto-resolves 90% of cases (refunds, tracking, FAQs) and escalates the rest

data-analyst.description: Market Research Analyst — analyzes trends, generates SWOT, creates reports with data

creative-studio.description: Creative Director — design briefs, image prompts, brand voice, ad copy

crypto-trader.description: Crypto Trading Analyst — technical analysis, patterns, risk assessment with confidence scores

bot-dev.description: Trading Bot Developer — code review, feature implementation, optimization. Security-first

web-sales.description: Web Analysis & Sales Specialist — UX/SEO audits, find contacts, write personalized pitches

company-builder.description: Company Builder — builds companies from scratch with simulations, business plans, and GTM strategy

memecoin-creator.description: Memecoin & Token Creator — full token launch from concept, tokenomics to viral community strategy

hr-manager.description: HR Manager — full hiring pipeline, onboarding, org design, and culture building

finance-wizard.description: Finance Wizard — P&L modeling, investor pitch financials, revenue models, and fundraising prep

brand-strategist.description: Brand Strategist — brand naming, identity systems, positioning, voice, and messaging frameworks

growth-hacker.description: Growth Hacker — viral loops, funnel optimization, A/B tests, retention, and product-led growth

project-manager.description: Project Manager — sprint planning, milestones, risk registers, Gantt charts, and team coordination

order-processor.description: E-commerce Order Processor — listens for new orders via webhook, validates payment, places supplier orders, and notifies customers with tracking info

bookkeeper.description: AI Bookkeeper — pulls Stripe/PayPal transaction data, categorises expenses, generates P&L reports, and prepares quarterly tax exports
specialties: COGS vs Ads vs Shipping split

inventory-sync.description: Inventory Sync Agent — monitors supplier stock levels, forecasts demand using 7-day sales averages, and triggers auto-reorders before stockouts

email-marketer.description: Email Marketing Agent — segments customers (new/abandoned-cart/repeat), generates personalised GPT-powered email copy, runs A/B tests on subject lines, and sends via Mailchimp

social-poster.description: Social Media Poster — generates viral content scripts and images, schedules posts across Instagram/TikTok/Twitter at peak engagement times, and auto-replies to early comments

product-researcher.description: Product Researcher — scans TikTok trends and Amazon bestsellers daily, validates demand via Google Trends / JungleScout scoring, writes GPT-powered listings, and auto-publishes to Shopify

ecom-dashboard.description: E-commerce Dashboard Agent — aggregates real-time metrics (revenue, profit margin, orders, top products) from Stripe + Shopify and surfaces alerts for anomalies

lead-hunter-elite.description: LeadHunterElite — B2B lead generation specialist that finds, qualifies and enriches leads from public sources with ICP scoring and outreach script generation

cold-outreach-assassin.description: ColdOutreachAssassin — builds and executes multi-channel cold sequences (email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp) with A/B testing and automated follow-up tracking

sales-closer-pro.description: SalesCloserPro — handles negotiations, objection handling and deal closing via chat/email/call scripts using SPIN, Challenger, and MEDDIC frameworks

linkedin-growth-hacker.description: LinkedInGrowthHacker — LinkedIn profile optimization, connection campaigns, and viral content creation for B2B lead attraction and brand building

ad-campaign-wizard.description: AdCampaignWizard — designs, launches and optimizes paid ads (Meta/Google/LinkedIn) with ROAS prediction, creative briefs, and budget allocation

referral-rocket.description: ReferralRocket — builds automated referral programs with incentive calculation, tracking mechanics, and viral sharing copy that turns customers into ambassadors

partnership-matchmaker.description: PartnershipMatchmaker — finds and pitches JV/partnership opportunities with partner scoring, pitch deck generation, and deal structure templates

conversion-rate-optimizer.description: ConversionRateOptimizer — analyzes funnels, designs A/B tests, and provides CRO recommendations to increase conversion rates across landing pages and sales funnels

engineering-assistant.description: Engineering Assistant — full-stack software engineering help: frontend (React/Vue/TS), backend (APIs/DBs), AI/ML engineering, code review, DevOps, database design, security, and architecture

ui-designer.description: UI Designer — design systems, component specs, accessibility audits (WCAG 2.1), color palettes, typography, responsive layouts, dark mode, and developer handoff documentation

qa-tester.description: QA Tester — test plans, test case generation, API testing, bug reports, performance testing, security testing (OWASP), accessibility testing, and production readiness certification

paid-media-specialist.description: Paid Media Specialist — Google Ads and Meta Ads strategy, campaign architecture, keyword research, ad copy, audience targeting, conversion tracking, budget allocation, and performance diagnosis

obsidian-memory.description: Obsidian Memory Base — AI knowledge-base integration with an Obsidian vault: ask questions saved as notes, keyword search, write notes, rebuild vault index, and report vault status

ascend-forge.description: ASCEND FORGE — top-layer self-improver: GENERAL/MONEY/AUTO modes, BLACKLIGHT override, prompt scanner, patch/approval/rollback/changelog system, failsafe

blacklight.description: BLACKLIGHT Autonomous Intelligence — darknet & blockchain monitoring, autonomous goal→execute loop running 24/7

hermes-agent.description: Hermes Agent — multi-channel messaging orchestrator (WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord/SMS/email) with unified conversation context

turbo-quant.description: Turbo Quant — quantitative trading engine with signal generation, backtesting, risk scoring, and portfolio optimisation. Modes: MONEY/POWER/AUTO

financial-deepsearch.description: Financial DeepSearch — combines Yahoo Finance, SEC EDGAR, and DuckDuckGo for deep company research, earnings analysis, and market intelligence

course-creator.description: Course Creator — end-to-end online course automation: outlines, lesson writing (~1000 words each), quizzes, pricing tiers, 5-email launch sequences, sales copy

faceless-video.description: Faceless Video — YouTube/TikTok production pipeline: scripts, scene extraction, voiceover text, Midjourney image prompts, SEO optimisation, 30-day upload schedules

arbitrage-bot.description: Arbitrage Bot — scans Amazon/eBay/Walmart/StockX for ROI ≥ 20% price arbitrage opportunities with watchlist management and trend detection

newsletter-bot.description: Newsletter Bot — automated email newsletters with RSS curation, subscriber segmentation, HTML/text generation, and SMTP/Mailchimp delivery

appointment-setter.description: Appointment Setter — sales funnel orchestrator: prospect discovery, 5-touch outreach campaigns, pipeline tracking (prospect→contacted→qualified→appointment→closed)

web-researcher.description: Web Researcher — autonomous web research via DuckDuckGo/Wikipedia/Tavily/SerpAPI with source citations and cross-bot IPC for fact-based answers

signal-community.description: Signal Community — aggregates polymarket-trader and MiroFish signals, formats for Telegram/Discord, tracks signal performance, manages community newsletters

lead-intelligence.description: Lead Intelligence Pipeline — 4-agent system: lead-hunter (discover) → lead-scorer (rank by ICP) → deal-matcher (deal fit) → outreach-agent (personalized sequences)

company-manager.description: Company Manager — manages company information, team structure, operational workflows, and business processes for multi-client or multi-company setups

budget-tracker.description: Budget Tracker — per-agent monthly cost tracking with token usage monitoring, configurable budget caps (USD), 80% warning threshold and hard-stop enforcement

goal-alignment.description: Goal Alignment — hierarchical goal context injector: Company Mission → Project Goals → Task Context. Ensures every agent knows what to do and why.

governance.description: Governance — board-level approval gates for high-impact agent actions. Risk levels: LOW (auto-approved), MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL. Immutable audit trail.
